name: engineering
description: Software engineering methodology — TDD, systematic debugging, code review, planning, git worktrees, and subagent-driven development.

interface.shortDescription: TDD, debugging, code review, planning workflows
interface.longDescription: Best-in-class software engineering process skills: test-driven development, systematic debugging, writing & executing plans, code review (giving and receiving), git worktrees, and subagent-driven development. Sourced from the MIT-licensed superpowers collection.
